evidence: Chatty or highly consumed interfaces: interface:com.mongodb.lang.Nullable, interface:org.bson.BsonDocument, interface:com.mongodb.assertions.Assertions, interface:org.bson.Document, interface:org.bson.BsonValue
recommendations: Simplify and stabilize heavily consumed interface surfaces.
summary: Interfaces are inconsistent, overly complex, too chatty, or leak internal implementation details.
title: Bad Interface / API Design
